query: SELECT id, title, DATE_FORMAT(startTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as startTime, DATE_FORMAT(endTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as endTime, liverName, category, status FROM schedules;
